source_test: HEC.FDA.Model/metrics/AggregatedConsequencesBinned.cs (no upstream unit test file exists for this class; oracle-gate-reproduced against the real AggregatedConsequencesBinned/PutDataIntoHistogram/AddConsequenceRealization directly)
note: construct = {damage_category, asset_category, convergence: {min_iterations, max_iterations}, impact_area_id, consequence_type, risk_type}, matching the AggregatedConsequencesBinned(string, string, ConvergenceCriteria, int, ConsequenceType, RiskType) compute ctor; ConvergenceCriteria is built with the 2-arg (minIterations, maxIterations) ctor (ZAlpha/Tolerance left at their defaults), exactly as the inventory fixture's `generate_then_sample_struct_yvals` case does. `consequence_type`/`risk_type` are the C# enum member names (ConsequenceType: UNASSIGNED/Damage/LifeLoss/All; RiskType: Fail/Non_Fail/Total/Unassigned). `realizations` is a list of {iteration, damage, count} applied in order via AddConsequenceRealization(damage, iteration, count) before a single PutDataIntoHistogram() call. Every assertion in a case reuses the same constructed-and-staged object (not rebuilt per assertion), since PutDataIntoHistogram is only meaningful called once per staged batch. Assertion `method` dispatches sample_mean_expected_annual_consequences (args []), consequence_exceeded_with_probability_q (args [q]), or quantity_exceeded_with_probability_q (args [q]). Cases: (1) single_iteration_narrow_range -- IterationCount pinned to 1 via the ConvergenceCriteria quirk (MaxIterations < 100 forces IterationCount = 1), so the one realization fills the entire staging array and the range-based bin-width branch sees range == 0 (< INITIAL_BIN_QUANTITY), exercising the DynamicHistogram::DEFAULT_BIN_WIDTH branch cleanly with no staged-array-zero contamination; (2) multi_iteration_wide_range -- IterationCount defaults to 100 (MaxIterations >= 100), only 6 of the 100 staging slots are written, so the unwritten 0.0 slots participate in PutDataIntoHistogram's min/max and pull the range to [0, 3000], exercising the range/INITIAL_BIN_QUANTITY branch and the staged-array quirk documented in aggregated_consequences_binned.hpp; (3) negative_and_mixed_values -- IterationCount 100 again, negative and positive realizations plus the untouched-zero slots, still under INITIAL_BIN_QUANTITY (range 175), LifeLoss/Non_Fail enum coverage.
